places.name: Basilica Cisterns of Istanbul
places.description: A marvel of Byzantine engineering under the streets of Istanbul.

places.name: Ottoman Bird Palaces
places.description: The ornate miniature mansions were built for Istanbul's feathered residents.

places.name: Tombili
places.description: A meow-velous tribute to a beloved street cat, made famous on the internet.

places.name: Viking Runes at Hagia Sophia
places.description: A small etching on the white marble parapet was written in runic script by a Viking mercenary.

places.name: Tombs of the Sultans
places.description: Five sultans and their families rest in eternal splendor, teeming with overlooked beauty and drama.

places.name: Obelisk of Theodosius
places.description: This remarkably well-preserved Egyptian plinth is pretty well traveled for a giant piece of stone.

places.name: Hagia Sophia Wishing Column
places.description: Legend says if you stick your thumb in the hole and it gets wet, your wish will be granted.

places.name: Pudding Shop (Lale Restaurant)
places.description: This crucial gathering spot along the "hippie trail" still displays old notes between traveling beatniks and backpackers.

places.name: Pierre Loti Hill
places.description: Have tea in a cemetery with a dazzling view of Istanbul.

places.name: Kanaat Lokantasi
places.description: This family-owned canteen has been selling goat milk ice cream since 1933.
